meaning: No recoverable survey data — too many corrupted/unreadable images. Causes image_capture_score = 0 and drone_score = 0.
Actual image positions do not provide enough overlap for photogrammetric reconstruction.

condition: Images are a mix of DNG and JPG formats
meaning: Inconsistent radiometric quality across the dataset.
Lighting changed significantly during the survey — radiometric calibration affected.
A RINEX recording gap of 60s+ effectively breaks the carrier phase solution. Hard rule zeros rover_continuity_score.
Rover took over 5 minutes to reach stable tracking — limited pre-flight convergence time.
Satellite geometry was poor during the flight — significant sky obstruction.
Planned survey area not fully flown. Unflown area cannot be recovered without re-flight.
Survey flown in wind exceeding safe operating limits — image blur and unstable flight.

condition: Open-Meteo API unavailable; ATT-derived proxy band == unknown
meaning: Wind speed could not be confirmed from API and BIN attitude proxy was inconclusive — wind_condition_score derived from fallback band only.
v2_1_q_lock: Q-DRONE-4: triggers indicator-level null on L3I_FC_005 (wind_condition_score). Different from missing input — explicit "infrastructure couldn't verify" condition. Composite scoring should respect indicator-null.

meaning: Significant altitude fluctuation during cruise — GSD inconsistent across the site.
ODM estimated lens parameters from the images themselves — circular dependency with the reconstruction.
v2_1_q_lock: Q-DRONE-5: stays MEDIUM (material). Self-calibration works for most cases; flagging at review level lets operator decide whether to insist on pre-calibration based on accuracy requirements.

meaning: No calibration file present at all.
Calibration file is for a different camera than the one used in this survey.
Calibration older than 36 months — lens parameters may have drifted.
Calibration date cannot be determined — recency cannot be assessed.
Drone produced no recoverable data. drone_score=0. All downstream processing stops.
No CAM records found in the BIN. PPK falls back to less-precise EXIF timestamps for epoch matching. (Was MRK_FILE_MISSING.)
Number of CAM shutter records in the BIN does not match total_images on the SD card. Indicates a recording error or missing images.
